note: Migrate MPI-owned model re-hosts HF->Cloudflare R2 (Standard, free egress). Billing confirmed: PayPal on file, R2 Paid Active, no free-tier wall. Watchdog/cap exist BECAUSE of HF throttle -> candidates for removal on R2.

GC item DONE EARLY (forced, release-day): watchdog disabled to no-op (commit a780e0a). It crashed the whole server (code 1) via ERR_STREAM_WRITE_AFTER_END when HF throttled gemma-clip to 101KB/s + bogus best=6554MB/s. Method body left for R2 task to delete fully (+ _bestSpeed/_slowSince/_slowReconnect* fields + SLOW_RECONNECT_* consts). CORRECTION: verified master never had the watchdog. add 02ef2c0 + disable a780e0a are BOTH RunPod-only (git branch --contains 02ef2c0 = RunPod; git show master:downloadManager.js = no watchdog markers). So master (1.0.1) never had the crash bug -> NO cherry-pick needed. Earlier card item (b) saying carry a780e0a to master was wrong, fixed.
